creative_brief: Clean, editorial layout. No hero image needed. Use a simple horizontal rule to separate the three sections. Warm off-white background, dark text. CTA button below sign-off: 'See the Birchal offer page'.
subject: Your 24-hour head start: here's exactly how it works
preheader: Walk through the mechanics before launch day. No surprises.
body:
Hi {first_name},

Last week a VIP asked me: "What actually happens when the round opens?"

I realised I'd never spelled it out properly. So here it is.

---

On the evening of 22 June, you get an email from me. Subject line will be unmissable. Inside is your direct Birchal link, live 24 hours before the public sees anything.

You click through. You choose your amount. You confirm. That's it.

No scramble. No watching a countdown with everyone else. You're already in.

---

Why does the head start matter?

Crowdfunding rounds can fill fast, especially when a community has been waiting. VIPs who move on day one lock their position before the public wave arrives.

The refundable deposit you placed is your proof of intent. It's not deducted from your investment. It just held your spot.

---

If you want to think it over before 23 June, that's exactly what this window is for. Have a number in mind. Know your "yes" before the link lands.

I'll be in your inbox on 22 June.

Rachel

---

Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
user_review_note: We need to remove anything about investing dollar amounts. No minimum investment, no maximum. We can say that we are going to do a raise, but not those parts. Also, must as the CSF warning.
